goal: Add renderer-neutral viewport pan inertia scheduling, conformance/template replay coverage, and closeout docs while keeping velocity estimation, frame loops, and renderer smoke outside jellyflow-runtime.
checkpoints: after JPIS-020 pure inertia planner tests pass
side_effect_policy: User authorized autonomous commits in this session; commit only verified bounded work, do not push, and do not revert unrelated user changes.
stop_conditions: renderer or platform dependency required inside jellyflow-core or jellyflow-runtime
runtime needs to estimate raw pointer velocity
runtime needs to own timers, event loops, or cancellation queues
existing immediate viewport pan/zoom behavior changes without intentional test updates
scope expands into renderer smoke or platform-specific physics parity
